folio.label: 75v
folio.l: He red it , witú ful good deuociouö
He told me eke , for what occasiouö
Amphiorax at Thebes , lost his lyf
Myn husbond had a legend , of his wyf
Exiphilem , that for an ouche of gold
Hatú preuyly , vn to the grekes I told
Where that hire husbonde , hid hi~ in a place
For whicú he had , at Thebes sory grace
Of lyma told he me , and of lucye
They bothe maden , here husbondes for to deye
That on for loue , that other was for hate
Lyma , hire husbonde , vp on an euen late
Enpoysoned hatú , for that she was his foo
Lucya lykerous , loued hire husbond so
That for he shuld alwey , vp on hire thynke
She ©af hi~ swicú , a maner loue drynke
That he was ded , er it were by the morwe
And thus algates , husbondes han sorwe
Than told he me , how on lathimyus
Compleyned , vn to his felawe , Arryus
That in his gardeyn , growed swicú a tree
On whicú he seide , how that hise wyues three
Honged hem self , for hertes dispetous
O lef brother , q¶ this Arryus
ñeue me a plante , of thilk blissed tree
And in myn gardeyn , planted shal it be
Of lattere date , of wyues hatú he red
That some han slayn , here husbondes in here bed
And let hire lecchour , digút hire al the nygút
While that the cors , lay in the floor vp rigút
And some han dreuyn nayles , in here brayne
While that they slep~ , & thus they han he~ slayne
Some han ©euen he~ poysouö , in here drynke
He spak more harm , than hert may be thynke
And ther witú al , he knew of moo prouerbes
Than in this world , growetú gras or Erbes
Bet is q¶ he , thyn habitaciouö
Be witú a lyouö , or a foul dragouö
Than witú a womman , vsyng for to chide
Bet is q¶ he , hie in the roof a byde
Than witú an angry womman , doun in the hous
¢ They ben so wykked , and so contrarious
They haten , that here husbondes louen ay
He seide a womman , kast hire shame a way
Whan she cast of hire smok , and forthere moo
A fair womman , but she be chast also
Is lyke a goldryngö , in a sowes nose
